nyt-style-header.notes: 3-tier NYT-style masthead — utility bar, centered nameplate, sticky section nav.

nyt-style-footer.notes: 5-column NYT-style footer with masthead header row, social links, newsletter.

nyt-style-homepage.notes: 3-column hero, 4-col investigations grid, sidebar (Most Read, Newsletter, About).

nyt-style-chapter-page.notes: Two-column layout (article + sticky sidebar). Chapter position bar. Evidence summary sidebar with visual bar.

nyt-style-article-page.notes: Full-width container. Section bar. Two-column with sticky sidebar. Semantic evidence tier colors.

nyt-style-methodology-page.notes: Two-column with sidebar (on-page nav, evidence legend, related pages, support CTA). Section bar breadcrumb.

nyt-style-sources-page.notes: Two-column with sidebar (8 verification databases, related pages, support CTA). Section bar breadcrumb.

nyt-style-search-page.notes: Two-column with sidebar (popular topics, chapter browser, related pages). Section bar breadcrumb.

nyt-style-bookmarks-page.notes: NEW: Two-column with reading progress sidebar, quick nav, support CTA. Section bar breadcrumb.

nyt-style-about-page.notes: NEW: Two-column with at-a-glance stats, evidence tiers, related pages sidebar. Editorial team cards. Section bar breadcrumb.

nyt-style-privacy-page.notes: NEW: Two-column with on-page nav sidebar, related pages. Section bar breadcrumb.

nyt-style-terms-page.notes: NEW: Two-column with on-page nav sidebar, CC license badge, related pages. Section bar breadcrumb.

lazy-chapter-splitting.notes: 31 individual chapter files, hybrid loader with cache.

admin-dashboard.notes: Full admin with login, 7 pages, social pack generator.

sharing.notes: SharePanel on all content pages, 7 platforms + native share.

chapter-images.notes: 18 chapters with Wikimedia Commons images, grayscale-to-color hover.

analytics.notes: Server-side analytics with country detection, daily trends.

social-packs.notes: 6 content packs with 10-slide Instagram carousels each.

book-reader.notes: Full reading interface with TTS, font controls, download modal.

evidence-system.notes: Three-tier with semantic CSS variables + dark mode variants.

auth-system.notes: Neon PostgreSQL backend with JWT sessions, bcrypt hashing.

nyt-design.notes: UPGRADED: Full NYT consistency across ALL pages — header, footer, homepage, chapter, article, methodology, sources, search, bookmarks, about, privacy, terms.

seo.notes: JSON-LD all pages, per-chapter OG images (31 PNGs + SVGs), Twitter cards, bot SSR, sitemap, feed.xml.

build-reliability.notes: TypeScript strict, clean build, lazy loading, code splitting.

content-packs.notes: 6 packs + brand kit with 10 SVG assets.

dossier-pdf.notes: Full A4 PDF with cover page, TOC.

print-styles.notes: Comprehensive @page margins, grayscale evidence, URL expansion.

hubspot-pipeline.notes: All major pages wired, newsletter, exit-intent, content gate, SPA tracking.

ecommerce-optimization.notes: Conversion tracking, social proof, sticky membership bar.

google-translate.notes: 130+ languages via Google Translate Element API.

deep-state-page.notes: Evidence tiers, subscriber capture, homepage tab.

dark-mode.notes: Full semantic tokens, theme toggle, system preference default.

reading-progress.notes: Crimson progress bar on long-form pages.

cookie-consent.notes: GDPR-compliant with GA4 Consent Mode v2.

chapter-pdf-export.notes: Per-chapter PDF with cover, evidence tiers, quotes.

tabbed-record-page.notes: 6-tab layout with lazy loading, hash deep links.

brand-kit.notes: 10 SVG assets downloadable from Content Packs tab.

lead-scoring.notes: 11 behavioral events, 7 lifecycle stages, HubSpot + GA4 dual-fire.

per-chapter-og.notes: 31 unique 1200x630 OG images, PNG via resvg, bot SSR injection.

aipac-data-layer.notes: FEC-sourced: 180+ members, enrichment for top 15, 6 votes, 11 lobbyists.

aipac-interactive-diagram.notes: SVG hemicycle, member popups with photos/donations/votes.

aipac-tab-integration.notes: Tab 5, journalism tabs grouped, globe icon, hash deep-link.

community-forum.notes: Full Reddit clone — 9 communities, threaded comments, voting, awards, polls.

full-width-layout.notes: All pages widened to max-w-[1920px]. Responsive padding.

power-profiles-system.notes: 235+ profiles with sourced claims, donations, policy actions, connections.

power-profiles-data.notes: All 91 profiles fully expanded — 0 stubs remaining. Sourced claims, quotes, donations, policy actions, connections on every profile.
